title: Executive Order 5443—Power-Site Restoration No. 446
text:
California
So much of the order of May 27, 1913, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 364, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
MOUNT DIABLO MERIDIAN
T. 33 N., R. 1 W., sec. 22, NE. ¼ of SW. ¼, S. ½ of SW. ¼;
sec. 24, SW. ¼ of NE. ¼.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
September 12, 1930.
